user_id.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Primary key; matches `users.id` in the app DB. Used as RLS scope for `user_signals`.

type.description: x-ui-surface=internal | `individual` iff email domain ∈ CONSUMER_EMAIL_DOMAINS; else `company`.

name.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Display name from signup form.

signup_geo.description: x-ui-surface=internal | ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 (or alpha-3) region code from IP geolocation at signup. Feeds D9 geo inference.

domain.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Email domain extracted from signup address. Used as the cache key in `user_signals` and as the primary input to Clearbit/LinkedIn enrichment.

company_name.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Canonical company name from enrichment provider.

industry.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Industry label — feeds D6 Tier-2 inference. Expected taxonomy overlaps Module-0 D6 enum but may contain provider-specific free-text.

employee_count_band.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Headcount band (e.g. "1-10", "11-50"). Feeds D1 team_size Tier-2 inference.

funding_stage.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Funding stage (Bootstrap/Seed/SeriesA/…). Feeds D8 budget Tier-2 inference.

website_tech_stack.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Detected frontend/backend tech fingerprint (Wappalyzer-style). Used by scope_tree prior weighting.

compliance_badges.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Public compliance signals (SOC2/HIPAA/PCI/GDPR/FedRAMP). Feeds D10 SLA tier + D12 data-sensitivity defaults.

scraped_at.description: x-ui-surface=internal | ISO-8601 timestamp the enrichment row was produced. Used with the 30-day TTL on `user_signals` to decide rescrape.

scrape_confidence.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Aggregate enrichment confidence in [0,1]. Downstream Tier-2 inference multiplies its own confidence by this.

company_signals.description: x-ui-surface=internal | Present only when `type=company` AND the background scrape has landed. Absence is not an error.
